---
title: "Travel Pricing Analysis"
author: "Justin Ashton"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(vroom)
library(dplyr)

flights <- vroom(c("q1.csv", "q2.csv", "q3.csv", "q4.csv"))

nrow(flights)
glimpse(flights)
```

```{r}
#Filter departures out of NYC area only
nyc <- flights |>
  filter(ORIGIN %in% c("JFK", "LGA", "EWR")) |>
  filter(DEST_COUNTRY == "US") |>
  filter(MARKET_FARE > 0) |>
  filter(PASSENGERS > 0) |>
  select(YEAR, QUARTER, ORIGIN, DEST, TICKET_CARRIER, 
         MARKET_FARE, PASSENGERS, MARKET_DISTANCE)

nrow(nyc)
```

```{r}
#Filter outliers
nyc <- nyc |>
  filter(MARKET_FARE >= 30, MARKET_FARE <= 2000)

summary(nyc$MARKET_FARE)
nrow(nyc)
```

```{r}
#Create csv file for Excel use
write.csv(nyc, "nyc_flights_2024.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
